Mostafa Gamal is a Python Developer with contact information including email, phone number, GitHub, and LinkedIn profiles.

Mostafa Gamal received a Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science from Savitribai Phule Pune University in June 2018, preceded by HSC in June 2014 and SSC in June 2012 from the Maharashtra State Board.

From January 2019 to the present, Mostafa Gamal has worked as a Python Developer at Atos Syntel, focusing on computer vision for a US-based banking client, designing algorithms using OpenCV, PIL, and Numpy, and utilizing Git for version control.
In 2017, Mostafa Gamal developed a Smart Ambulance project concept, presented as a poster, and secured 1st Rank in a college-level competition.

Mostafa Gamal completed several certificates including ESD Program by Zensar Technologies in 2017, Employability Training by Barclays, Global Talent Track, and NASSCOM Foundation in 2015, and workshops on Medical IOT, Introduction to Arduino, and Robotics for Juniors in 2017 and 2016.

Mostafa Gamal was a finalist in the Project Prototyping Round of KPIT-Sparkle in 2018, secured 1st Rank in a College Level Poster Presentation in 2017, participated in Avishkar 2017 at Savitribai Phule Pune University, acquired sponsorship of INR 15,000 from Platinum Auto in 2017, and submitted a project idea to Accenture Innovation in 2018.
Mostafa Gamal possesses skills in Python, Django, OpenCV, PIL, Numpy, Git, HTML5, REST API, and MySQL.

From 2017 to 2018, Mostafa Gamal served as Treasurer for the IEEE Student Branch at JSCOE, Pune, managing financial records and budget. He also led teams in college events from 2016 to 2017 and organized an IEEE workshop on 'Excellence in English and Public Speaking' in 2017.

Savtribai Phule Pune University stands as a cornerstone of higher education in Pune, India, a vibrant institution shaping future innovators. It’s a place where ambition takes root and blossoms, evidenced by students like Mostafa Gamal, who emerged with a Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science in 2018. The University isn’t merely a degree-granting body; it’s a crucible for talent, fostering a competitive spirit showcased in events like Avishkar, its own internal research competition, and external challenges such as the prestigious KPIT-Sparkle, where Gamal reached the final prototyping round. It actively encourages practical application of knowledge, supporting student projects – Gamal’s securing sponsorship from Platinum Auto and submitting ideas to Accenture Innovation are testament to this. The University provides a platform for early recognition, as demonstrated by Gamal’s first-place finish in a college-level poster presentation. It’s a launchpad, preparing students not just for academic success, but for real-world impact, nurturing a generation equipped to contribute to the technological landscape.

Mostafa Gamal is a driven Python Developer currently applying his skills in computer vision at Atos Syntel, crafting algorithms for a US-based banking client with a toolkit encompassing OpenCV, PIL, and NumPy. A 2018 graduate of Savitribai Phule Pune University with a Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science, his foundation was built on a strong academic record – completing his HSC and SSC through the Maharashtra State Board. 

Even during his studies, Mostafa demonstrated a proactive and inventive spirit. He conceived and presented a ‘Smart Ambulance’ project, earning first place in a college competition, and reached the finalist stage of the prestigious KPIT-Sparkle prototyping round. This inclination towards practical application extended to workshops covering Medical IoT, Arduino, and Robotics, alongside employability training with Barclays and Zensar Technologies. 

Beyond technical prowess, Mostafa possesses leadership qualities honed through his role as Treasurer for the IEEE Student Branch at JSCOE, where he managed finances and budgets, and by leading teams in various college events. He even organized a workshop focused on enhancing communication skills.  He’s readily accessible via email (mostafa.gamal@email.com), phone (+20 100 123 4567), and maintains an active presence on GitHub (github.com/mostafa-gamal) and LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/mostafa-gamal), showcasing a commitment to continuous learning and professional engagement.

2017 was a year of burgeoning ambition for Mostafa Gamal, a period marked by a clear drive to translate innovative ideas into tangible achievements. It was the year his “Smart Ambulance” concept took shape, earning him a first-place victory in a college poster presentation – a testament to his early aptitude for problem-solving within the medical technology space. Beyond this flagship project, 2017 saw Mostafa actively expanding his skillset, completing specialized training in areas like Medical IoT and Arduino, laying a foundational understanding for future endeavors. He wasn’t content with theoretical knowledge, however, actively seeking opportunities to apply it, evidenced by his participation in Avishkar at Savitribai Phule Pune University. This proactive approach extended to securing crucial sponsorship – INR 15,000 from Platinum Auto – demonstrating an emerging ability to navigate the practicalities of bringing a project to life. Simultaneously, he began to demonstrate leadership qualities, taking on the role of Treasurer for the IEEE Student Branch at JSCOE, Pune, meticulously managing finances and budgets. He also honed his organizational skills by leading teams and orchestrating an IEEE workshop focused on communication – a clear indication of a desire to not only innovate but also to empower others. 2017 wasn’t simply a year of learning; it was a year of *doing*, a launchpad for the projects and leadership roles that would define his trajectory into 2018.
